metadata.siteDescription: A curated home for traditional craftsmanship. Miyako preserves and celebrates exceptional independent artisans across Asia.
metadata.ogDescription: A curated home for traditional craftsmanship from exceptional independent artisans across Asia.

home.missionStatement: Miyako exists to preserve and celebrate traditional craftsmanship by giving exceptional independent artisans across Asia a carefully curated platform to share their work, their stories, and their heritage with audiences around the world.

mission.metaDescription: Miyako exists to preserve and celebrate traditional craftsmanship by giving exceptional independent artisans across Asia a carefully curated platform.
mission.label: Our Mission
mission.statement: Miyako exists to preserve and celebrate traditional craftsmanship by giving exceptional independent artisans across Asia a carefully curated platform to share their work, their stories, and their heritage with audiences around the world.
mission.philosophyP1: Behind every handcrafted piece is a lifetime of dedication, generations of knowledge, and a story that deserves to be remembered.
mission.philosophyP1b: Yet many remarkable artisans remain undiscovered outside their local communities.
mission.philosophyP2: Miyako was created to change that.
mission.philosophyP3: We work with a carefully selected group of independent artists and craftspeople across Asia to preserve traditional craftsmanship and introduce it to audiences who genuinely value handmade work.
mission.philosophyP4: Rather than simply selling products, we celebrate the people behind them, their heritage, their techniques, and the cultures they represent.
mission.philosophyP5: Every artisan featured on Miyako is thoughtfully curated for the quality of their work, authenticity of their practice, and the story they carry forward.
mission.philosophyClosing: To ensure exceptional craftsmanship is not only preserved, but appreciated by future generations around the world.
mission.step1Text: Explore a carefully curated collection of independent artisans. Learn about their craft, heritage, and the stories behind every piece.
mission.step2Text: When a piece resonates with you, send an inquiry directly through Miyako. We'll connect you with the artisan.
mission.step3Text: The artisan carefully prepares and ships your piece, arriving with its story and provenance.

artists.metaDescription: We partner with a small number of exceptional artisans, celebrating their craftsmanship, heritage, and the traditions.
artists.title: Our Artists
artists.intro: We partner with a small number of exceptional artisans, celebrating their craftsmanship, heritage, and the traditions.
